rulings.Case Title: COLBY LAM VS. ANDREW KENNY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication On Plaintiffs First, Second, Third, And Fifth Causes Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 23, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT M-J SF INVESTMENTS, LLC, JAMES NUNEMACHER, MICHAEL CASSIDY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication On Plaintiffs First, Second, Third, And Fifth Causes Of Action is continued to October 10, 2019 on Court's own motion. The Court notes that an unauthorized Second Amended opposition was filed after the original hearing date on September 9, 2019. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BALMORAL RESIDENCES, LLC VS. NICHOLAS CHRISTIE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 23, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS CHRISTIE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges an unlawful detainer based on nuisance, SFRO 37.9(a)(3). =(501/REQ)
